item19_detail.no_fpr_verbatim: We do not make any representations about a franchisee's future financial performance or the past financial performance of company-owned or franchised outlets. We also do not authorize our employees or representatives to make any such representations either orally or in writing.
item19_detail.substantiation_statement: If you receive any other financial performance information or projections of your future income, you should report it to our management by contacting William Fortier, Senior Vice President-Development-Americas, 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102, 703-883-1000, the Federal Trade Commission, and the appropriate state regulatory agencies.
